resources.string: Temperature %1$s akɔ fam akodu wo anohyeto a ɛyɛ %2$s
Kɔkɔbɔ: Sɛ wobɛma atifi hɔ nhyehyɛe no atumi ayɛ adwuma a, ebetumi ama wo batere no ayow ntɛmntɛm sen sɛnea ɛtaa yɛ no
Nneɛma a Wɔde Yɛ Nneɛma a Wɔahyɛ Da Ayɛ
Sɛ wopɛ a: URL a wɔahyɛ da ayɛ
Custom URL no nnyɛ set, anaasɛ ɛyɛ blank. Wubetumi akɔ nhyehyɛe mu de URL a wɔahyɛ da ayɛ aka ho
Na %1$s URL no yɛ blank, yɛsrɛ wo hwɛ wo %2$s fael no na sɔ hwɛ bio
Mfomso bi sii bere a na wɔrebɔ mmɔden sɛ wɔbɛma dwuma a wɔde di no ayɛ foforo
Entumi mfa %1$s data no ne %2$s data no nkabom
antumi anni nsɛm a wɔahyɛ ho nkɔm ho dwuma ho dwuma
Entumi anni wim tebea ho nsɛm a efi wo server no so no ho dwuma yiye, titiriw %1$s data no
Nsɛm a Wɔabɔ ho Nkɔmhyɛ Kratafa
Forecast Type \'%1$s\' no nyɛ adwuma, hwɛ wo settings fael no na sɔ hwɛ bio
Forecast URL a wɔanhyehyɛ, hyehyɛ no wɔ %1$s mu
Kyerɛ akenkan a ɛwɔ dan mu?
Wɔayɛ saa app yi updated nanso server a woreyɛ connecting no nnyaa inigo plugin no foforo mma Weewx. Ebia fields rentumi nkyerɛ yiye kosi sɛ weewx no bɛba foforo
Update interval no nyɛ adwuma, update nhyehyɛe na afei san sɔ hwɛ
%1$s no seesei hwehwɛ %2$s data fael a ɛfiri %3$s server, ɛhia sɛ wo sesa %4$s na wo yɛ %5$s fael no foforɔ ansa na app yi ayɛ adwuma yie. Klik Ok na woanya nsɛm pii wɔ %6$s ho
Manual Update Set, Swipe Refresh Screen no na fa wo ho hyɛ mu
Temperature %1$s akɔ soro akodu wo anohyeto a ɛyɛ %2$s
Ɔsram a edi hɔ no mu nsɛm a esisi?
Wɔnnyɛ download anaa app no ​​ho nhyehyɛe biara
Ɛho hia sɛ wɔbɔ wo amanneɛ na wɔabɔ wo kɔkɔ bere a ɔhyew, osutɔ anaa osutɔ dodow du anohyeto a wode asi hɔ no ho no
Esiane sɛ wopow notification permission no mprenu nti, ɛsɛ sɛ wo ma ɛyɛ adwuma wɔ nhyehyɛe mu mmom, fi ase nhyehyɛe?
Yɛsrɛ sɛ twɛn bere a yɛrehwɛ sɛ URL a wode kɔe no yɛ nokware no

plurals.name: processing_errors
plurals.item: Wɔhunuu %1$d mfomsoɔ wɔ %2$s fael no mu, hwɛ %2$s fael a wɔhunuu wɔ %3$s anaa hwɛ %4$s logs ma nsɛm no
%1$d mfomsoɔ bi wɔ hɔ a wɔhunuu wɔ %2$s fael no mu, hwɛ %2$s fael a wɔhunuu wɔ %3$s anaa hwɛ %4$s logs ma nsɛm no

resources.string: Radar mfonini no da so ara retwe
Radar type \'%1$s\' nyɛ adwuma, hwɛ wo settings fael no na sɔ hwɛ bio
Radar URL no nyɛ nea wɔde asi hɔ. Wubetumi akɔ nhyehyɛe ahorow mu akɔsesa
Osu a ɛtɔ wɔ Inches mu?
Bɔ kɔkɔ da biara da bere a osu no adu nea woahyɛ no so no
Osuo %1$s ne wo anohyetoɔ a ɛyɛ %2$s no ahyia
Osu a Ɛtɔ So Kɛse Ho Kɔkɔbɔ?
Ɛbɔ kɔkɔ sɛ osu dodow boro anohyeto a emu yɛ den a egyina bere tenten a osu tɔ so
Osuo dodoɔ a ɛyɛ %1$s wɔ %2$d %3$s a atwam no mu no akɔ \'Severe\' level
Osu a Ɛtɔ So Kɛse Ho Kɔkɔbɔ
Kɔkɔbɔ Osu a Ɛtɔ Ho Kɔkɔbɔ?
Ɛbɔ kɔkɔ sɛ osu dodow boro kɔkɔbɔ anohyeto a egyina bere tenten a osu tɔ so
Osuo dodoɔ a ɛyɛ %1$s wɔ %2$d %3$s a atwam no mu no akɔ \'Kɔkɔbɔ\' gyinabea
Kɔkɔbɔ Osu a Ɛtɔ Ho Kɔkɔbɔ
Hwɛ Osu a Ɛtɔ Ho Kɔkɔbɔ?
Ɛbɔ kɔkɔ sɛ osu dodow boro ɔwɛn anohyeto a egyina bere tenten a osu tɔ so
Osuo dodoɔ a ɛyɛ %1$s wɔ %2$d %3$s a atwam no mu no akɔ \'Watch\' level
Hwɛ Osu a Ɛtɔ Ho Kɔkɔbɔ
Paw bere a wɔde yɛ foforo
Wogye di sɛ wopɛ sɛ wuyi data nyinaa fi hɔ?
Sie App Debug Nsɛm a Wɔakyerɛw
Da so ara retwe nkɔmhyɛ data
Wɔda so ara retwe wim tebea ho nsɛm
Ɛbɔ kɔkɔ kodu mprenu da biara bere a ɔhyew no adu wo anohyeto a woahyɛ no so no
Update nkutoo na ɛwɔ WiFi so?
Set to manual updates, nanso content cache biara nni hɔ de besi nnɛ
Wɔde URL no sii hɔ sɛ default anaasɛ na hwee nni mu
Fa update times a ɛyɛ pɛpɛɛpɛ di dwuma
Na ontumi nkɔ anaasɛ woantwe amfi custom URL a wɔakyerɛ no mu
Na ontumi nkɔka anaasɛ ɔntwe nkɔmhyɛ no
Na ontumi mfa radar= mfonini mfi Intanɛt so anaasɛ ɔntwe
Na ontumi mfa nhyehyɛe no nkɔ anaasɛ ɔntwe mfi wo server no so
Na ontumi mfa webcam mfonini bi nkɔ anaasɛ ɔntwe mfi wo server so
Wontumi ntwe %1$s no efisɛ na URL no yɛ blank
Webcam Refresh Bere a Wɔde Yɛ Adwuma
Webcam mfonini no da so ara retwe
Webcam URL no nyɛ nea wɔahyehyɛ anaasɛ ɛnyɛ hwee
Anka updated nanso wifi connection no nni hɔ
